TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Marekrek_kiwkay, title = Marekrek_kiwkay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marekrek_kiwkay} }

S.FORM: == Marekrek kiwkay ciwlo kiwkay == I 1956 (45) miheca patireng to kilang a kiwkay, pipacakatan itiya ira ci Huang Qingfeng , Song Zhengqing , Wang Mingrong aci Lin Jinming foksi, ciwlo ira ci Zhang Ayuan , Huang Jiamao . 7 ko laloma'an no mitooray salikaka. 1957 (46) miheca misingkiw to ciwlo ci Cai Yuqing aci Hu Qinghai ko matoro'ay. Sicuci matoro'ay ci Wang Maoxiong . 1 miheca ci Lin Jinming sinkiwsi itini itiya. 1958 (47) miheca pakalitemoh to faliyos, maloyoh ko kiwkay. Saan miliyaw patireng aca, itiya ci Zhuo Xinde foksi ko matayalay i kiwkay. 1959 (48) miheca ci Song Zhengqing foksi ko mikeriday to pisingkiw to ciwlo to sicuci, matoro'ay a ciwlo ci Cai Yuqing aci Hu Qinghai tatosa, o sicuci matoro'ay ci Wang Maoxiong aci Pan Cunci tatosa, itiya ira ko 10 laloma'an mitooray salikaka, ci Qiu Wenji sinkiwsi ko matayalay to 1 miheca ira ko 6 folad itiya. 1963 (52) miheca miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ciwlo ci Zhang Shiliang aci Wang Maoxiong ko matoro'ay, sicuci ci Pan Cunci aci Pan Zhihao tatosa. Ci Wu Qingyun foksi ko matayalay i kiwkay, ira ko 11 laloma'an mitooray salikaka. 1967 (56) miheca, miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ci Wu Qingyun foksi ko mikeriday, o ciwlo ci Wang Maoxiong aci Lin Huosheng tatosa matoro'ay. O sicuci ci Huang Fusheng aci Lin Gaotian tatosa ko matoro'ay. Ira ko 16 laloma'an ko mitooray salikaka. 1973 (62) miheca 9 folad misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ci Xu Yidu foksi ko mikeriday, maalaay ciwlo ci Wang Maoxiong aci Lin Huosheng tatosa matoro'ay, sicuci ira ci Lin Gaotian aci Pan Zhihao tatosa ko matoro'ay itiya. 1975 (64) miheca 1 folad 5 romi'ad, mipatireng ci Hong Chuanxing sinkisian, mikihatiyaay foksi ira ci Xu Yidu , Wu Jianfeng , Wu Qingyun , Lin Rongfa , Lian Zhongyi , Lin Maosong , Qiu Wenji ko mikihatiyaay itiya. 1976 (65) miheca 10 folad 5 romi'ad, ci Lin Rongfa foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' to wawa ato mikerid to pitahekaan a lihay. 1977 (66) miheca 9 folad 10 romi'ad, ci Lian Zhongyi foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' ato pitaheka a lihay. 1978 (67) miheca 9 folad 5 romi'ad, ci Wang Mingrong foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' ato pitahekaan a lihay. Miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ciwlo maalaay ci You Wenji aci Gao Gibbon ko matoro'ay, sicuci ci Pan Zhihao aci Lin Qingmei tatosa ko matoro'ay. O mitooray salikaka no kiwkay ira ko 18 no laloma'an. Aniniay ciwlo ato sicuci (2021-2025) 4 miheca a lekad. Ciwlo: Chen Tiancai, Chen Chunmei, Lin Xiufang, Zhong Yi. Sicuci: Tian Hanmei, Li Yuhua, Gao Wenxiong, Huang Yucheng Laloma'an no mitooray: 15 loma'. Tamdaw no mitooray: 36 tamdaw. Sa'opo no tamdaw: Pilihayan: salongan 16 ko tamdaw no pilihay. Ka'emangay: 4 tamdaw. Kitokay: 8 tamdaw. Hamong to loma': 9 tamdaw. Focinkay: pacena'.
S.PHON: == marəkrək kiwkaj ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj == i **** (**) miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u kiɾaŋ a kiwkaj, pipaʦakatan itija ira ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *iŋfəŋ , so~uŋ *ħəŋ*iŋ , waŋ miŋro~uŋ aʦi ɾin *inmiŋ fo~uksi, ʦiwɾo~u ira ʦi *ħaŋ ajo~u~uan , ħo~u~uaŋ *iamao~u . * ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ʦi ʦai jo~u~u*iŋ aʦi ħo~u~u *iŋħai ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. siʦo~u~uʦi mato~uro~uʡaj ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ . * miħəʦa ʦi ɾin *inmiŋ sinkiwsi itini itija. **** (**) miħəʦa pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u faɾijo~us, maɾo~ujo~uħ ko~u kiwkaj. saan miɾijaw patirəŋ aʦa, itija ʦi *ħo~u~uo~u xinɬ~ɮə fo~uksi ko~u matajaɾaj i kiwkaj. **** (**) miħəʦa ʦi so~uŋ *ħəŋ*iŋ fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pisiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u to~u siʦo~u~uʦi, mato~uro~uʡaj a ʦiwɾo~u ʦi ʦai jo~u~u*iŋ aʦi ħo~u~u *iŋħai tato~usa, o~u siʦo~u~uʦi mato~uro~uʡaj ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi pan ʦo~u~unʦi tato~usa, itija ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka, ʦi *io~u~u wənji sinkiwsi ko~u matajaɾaj to~u * miħəʦa ira ko~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ itija. **** (**) miħəʦa miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦiwɾo~u ʦi *ħaŋ sħiɾiaŋ aʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi pan ʦo~u~unʦi aʦi pan *ħiħao~u tato~usa. ʦi wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un fo~uksi ko~u matajaɾaj i kiwkaj, ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa, miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦi wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~u ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi ɾin ħo~u~uo~usħəŋ tato~usa mato~uro~uʡaj. o~u siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ fo~u~usħəŋ aʦi ɾin *ao~utian tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan ko~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦi xo~u~u jiɬ~ɮo~u~u fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, maaɾaaj ʦiwɾo~u ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi ɾin ħo~u~uo~usħəŋ tato~usa mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ira ʦi ɾin *ao~utian aʦi pan *ħiħao~u tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj itija. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipatirəŋ ʦi ħo~uŋ ʦħo~u~uanxiŋ sinkisian, mikiħatijaaj fo~uksi ira ʦi xo~u~u jiɬ~ɮo~u~u , wo~u~u *ianfəŋ , wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un , ɾin ro~uŋfa , ɾian *ħo~uŋji , ɾin mao~uso~uŋ , *io~u~u wənji ko~u mikiħatijaaj itija. **** (**) miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾin ro~uŋfa fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ to~u wawa ato~u mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u pitaħəkaan a ɾiħaj. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾian *ħo~uŋji fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəka a ɾiħaj. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi waŋ miŋro~uŋ fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəkaan a ɾiħaj. miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦiwɾo~u maaɾaaj ʦi jo~uo~u~u wənji aʦi *ao~u *ib~b~vb~b~vo~un ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi pan *ħiħao~u aʦi ɾin *iŋməi tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. o~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj ira ko~u ** no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. aniniaj ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi (****-****) * miħəʦa a ɾəkaɬ~ɮ. ʦiwɾo~u: ʦħən tianʦai, ʦħən ʦħo~u~unməi, ɾin xio~u~ufaŋ, *ħo~uŋ ji. siʦo~u~uʦi: tian ħanməi, ɾi jo~u~uħo~u~ua, *ao~u wənxio~uŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ jo~u~uʦħəŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u mito~uo~uraj: ** ɾo~umaʡ. tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mito~uo~uraj: ** tamɬ~ɮaw. saʡo~upo~u no~u tamɬ~ɮaw: piɾiħajan: saɾo~uŋan ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u piɾiħaj. kaʡəmaŋaj: * tamɬ~ɮaw. kito~ukaj: * tamɬ~ɮaw. ħamo~uŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ: * tamɬ~ɮaw. fo~uʦinkaj: paʦənaʡ.
S.FORM: == Marekrek kiwkay ciwlo kiwkay == I 1956 (45) miheca patireng to kilang a kiwkay, pipacakatan itiya ira ci Huang Qingfeng , Song Zhengqing , Wang Mingrong aci Lin Jinming foksi, ciwlo ira ci Zhang Ayuan , Huang Jiamao . 7 ko laloma'an no mitooray salikaka. 1957 (46) miheca misingkiw to ciwlo ci Cai Yuqing aci Hu Qinghai ko matoro'ay. Sicuci matoro'ay ci Wang Maoxiong . 1 miheca ci Lin Jinming sinkiwsi itini itiya. 1958 (47) miheca pakalitemoh to faliyos, maloyoh ko kiwkay. Saan miliyaw patireng aca, itiya ci Zhuo Xinde foksi ko matayalay i kiwkay. 1959 (48) miheca ci Song Zhengqing foksi ko mikeriday to pisingkiw to ciwlo to sicuci, matoro'ay a ciwlo ci Cai Yuqing aci Hu Qinghai tatosa, o sicuci matoro'ay ci Wang Maoxiong aci Pan Cunci tatosa, itiya ira ko 10 laloma'an mitooray salikaka, ci Qiu Wenji sinkiwsi ko matayalay to 1 miheca ira ko 6 folad itiya. 1963 (52) miheca miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ciwlo ci Zhang Shiliang aci Wang Maoxiong ko matoro'ay, sicuci ci Pan Cunci aci Pan Zhihao tatosa. Ci Wu Qingyun foksi ko matayalay i kiwkay, ira ko 11 laloma'an mitooray salikaka. 1967 (56) miheca, miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ci Wu Qingyun foksi ko mikeriday, o ciwlo ci Wang Maoxiong aci Lin Huosheng tatosa matoro'ay. O sicuci ci Huang Fusheng aci Lin Gaotian tatosa ko matoro'ay. Ira ko 16 laloma'an ko mitooray salikaka. 1973 (62) miheca 9 folad misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ci Xu Yidu foksi ko mikeriday, maalaay ciwlo ci Wang Maoxiong aci Lin Huosheng tatosa matoro'ay, sicuci ira ci Lin Gaotian aci Pan Zhihao tatosa ko matoro'ay itiya. 1975 (64) miheca 1 folad 5 romi'ad, mipatireng ci Hong Chuanxing sinkisian, mikihatiyaay foksi ira ci Xu Yidu , Wu Jianfeng , Wu Qingyun , Lin Rongfa , Lian Zhongyi , Lin Maosong , Qiu Wenji ko mikihatiyaay itiya. 1976 (65) miheca 10 folad 5 romi'ad, ci Lin Rongfa foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' to wawa ato mikerid to pitahekaan a lihay. 1977 (66) miheca 9 folad 10 romi'ad, ci Lian Zhongyi foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' ato pitaheka a lihay. 1978 (67) miheca 9 folad 5 romi'ad, ci Wang Mingrong foksi ko mikeriday to pipaino' ato pitahekaan a lihay. Miliyaw misingkiw to ciwlo ato sicuci, ciwlo maalaay ci You Wenji aci Gao Gibbon ko matoro'ay, sicuci ci Pan Zhihao aci Lin Qingmei tatosa ko matoro'ay. O mitooray salikaka no kiwkay ira ko 18 no laloma'an. Aniniay ciwlo ato sicuci (2021-2025) 4 miheca a lekad. Ciwlo: Chen Tiancai, Chen Chunmei, Lin Xiufang, Zhong Yi. Sicuci: Tian Hanmei, Li Yuhua, Gao Wenxiong, Huang Yucheng Laloma'an no mitooray: 15 loma'. Tamdaw no mitooray: 36 tamdaw. Sa'opo no tamdaw: Pilihayan: salongan 16 ko tamdaw no pilihay. Ka'emangay: 4 tamdaw. Kitokay: 8 tamdaw. Hamong to loma': 9 tamdaw. Focinkay: pacena'.
S.PHON: == marəkrək kiwkaj ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj == i **** (**) miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u kiɾaŋ a kiwkaj, pipaʦakatan itija ira ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *iŋfəŋ , so~uŋ *ħəŋ*iŋ , waŋ miŋro~uŋ aʦi ɾin *inmiŋ fo~uksi, ʦiwɾo~u ira ʦi *ħaŋ ajo~u~uan , ħo~u~uaŋ *iamao~u . * ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ʦi ʦai jo~u~u*iŋ aʦi ħo~u~u *iŋħai ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. siʦo~u~uʦi mato~uro~uʡaj ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ . * miħəʦa ʦi ɾin *inmiŋ sinkiwsi itini itija. **** (**) miħəʦa pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u faɾijo~us, maɾo~ujo~uħ ko~u kiwkaj. saan miɾijaw patirəŋ aʦa, itija ʦi *ħo~u~uo~u xinɬ~ɮə fo~uksi ko~u matajaɾaj i kiwkaj. **** (**) miħəʦa ʦi so~uŋ *ħəŋ*iŋ fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pisiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u to~u siʦo~u~uʦi, mato~uro~uʡaj a ʦiwɾo~u ʦi ʦai jo~u~u*iŋ aʦi ħo~u~u *iŋħai tato~usa, o~u siʦo~u~uʦi mato~uro~uʡaj ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi pan ʦo~u~unʦi tato~usa, itija ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka, ʦi *io~u~u wənji sinkiwsi ko~u matajaɾaj to~u * miħəʦa ira ko~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ itija. **** (**) miħəʦa miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦiwɾo~u ʦi *ħaŋ sħiɾiaŋ aʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi pan ʦo~u~unʦi aʦi pan *ħiħao~u tato~usa. ʦi wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un fo~uksi ko~u matajaɾaj i kiwkaj, ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa, miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦi wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~u ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi ɾin ħo~u~uo~usħəŋ tato~usa mato~uro~uʡaj. o~u siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ fo~u~usħəŋ aʦi ɾin *ao~utian tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. ira ko~u ** ɾaɾo~umaʡan ko~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦi xo~u~u jiɬ~ɮo~u~u fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, maaɾaaj ʦiwɾo~u ʦi waŋ mao~uxio~uŋ aʦi ɾin ħo~u~uo~usħəŋ tato~usa mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ira ʦi ɾin *ao~utian aʦi pan *ħiħao~u tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj itija. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipatirəŋ ʦi ħo~uŋ ʦħo~u~uanxiŋ sinkisian, mikiħatijaaj fo~uksi ira ʦi xo~u~u jiɬ~ɮo~u~u , wo~u~u *ianfəŋ , wo~u~u *iŋjo~u~un , ɾin ro~uŋfa , ɾian *ħo~uŋji , ɾin mao~uso~uŋ , *io~u~u wənji ko~u mikiħatijaaj itija. **** (**) miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾin ro~uŋfa fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ to~u wawa ato~u mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u pitaħəkaan a ɾiħaj. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾian *ħo~uŋji fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəka a ɾiħaj. **** (**) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi waŋ miŋro~uŋ fo~uksi ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u pipaino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəkaan a ɾiħaj. miɾijaw misiŋkiw to~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi, ʦiwɾo~u maaɾaaj ʦi jo~uo~u~u wənji aʦi *ao~u *ib~b~vb~b~vo~un ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj, siʦo~u~uʦi ʦi pan *ħiħao~u aʦi ɾin *iŋməi tato~usa ko~u mato~uro~uʡaj. o~u mito~uo~uraj saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj ira ko~u ** no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan. aniniaj ʦiwɾo~u ato~u siʦo~u~uʦi (****-****) * miħəʦa a ɾəkaɬ~ɮ. ʦiwɾo~u: ʦħən tianʦai, ʦħən ʦħo~u~unməi, ɾin xio~u~ufaŋ, *ħo~uŋ ji. siʦo~u~uʦi: tian ħanməi, ɾi jo~u~uħo~u~ua, *ao~u wənxio~uŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ jo~u~uʦħəŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u mito~uo~uraj: ** ɾo~umaʡ. tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mito~uo~uraj: ** tamɬ~ɮaw. saʡo~upo~u no~u tamɬ~ɮaw: piɾiħajan: saɾo~uŋan ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u piɾiħaj. kaʡəmaŋaj: * tamɬ~ɮaw. kito~ukaj: * tamɬ~ɮaw. ħamo~uŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ: * tamɬ~ɮaw. fo~uʦinkaj: paʦənaʡ.
